mnemonics: My Very Excellent Mother Just Served Us Nachos
keyPoints: Stacks follow the principle of Last-In-First-Out.
Stacks use a LIFO data structure to store elements.
Operations supported by stacks include push and pop.
Array implementation of stacks where the last entered element is accessed first.
Applications of stacks include parsing expressions, evaluating postfix notation, and evaluating postfix expressions.
